beat: Present — Mira feels the pulse under Commons cobbles
artPrompt: Two-panel comic page, no text. Left: Mira Eggwarden (young hatchery mentor, practical robes, egg-care satchel) kneeling on warm Commons cobbles at dusk, hand on vibrating stone. Right: timber plaza of Riftwild Commons, amber lanterns, cyan hairline crack underfoot. Painterly fantasy comic, earth tones, cyan accent only. Original Riftwilds IP only. NO dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, or UI in the image.

lines.text: Riftwild Commons. Dusk. The cobbles remember a scream the town pretends was weather.

lines.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
lines.text: That's not a cart. That's a pulse.

lines.speaker: Mira Eggwarden
lines.text: Compact law says invite. It doesn't say ignore the floor when it answers.
